demo.incident1Postmortem: Intentional disruption displayed to verify the timeline rendering.
demo.incident1Reason: manual source · HTTP 503 · 42 min duration · postmortem available
demo.incident2Postmortem: Abnormal response time detected, followed by an automatic return to normal.
demo.incident2Reason: AI source · HTTP 522 · 42 min duration · postmortem available
demo.incident3Postmortem: Incident resolved after restoring the application service.
demo.incident3Reason: system source · HTTP 500 · 26 min duration · postmortem available
demo.incident4Reason: intermittent signals · HTTP 429 · 12 min duration · incomplete diagnosis
admin.meta.description: Secure local administration for this Insight instance.
admin.meta.dashboardDescription: Insight monitoring, incidents, and engine status.
admin.setup.title: Create the administrator
admin.setup.description: This account remains on this instance and only protects the Insight dashboard.
admin.setup.passwordHint: Use at least 12 characters. The password is hashed locally.
admin.setup.storage: Credentials are stored in this instance’s private local database.
admin.login.title: Sign in to Insight
admin.login.description: Access monitors, incidents, and settings for this instance.
admin.auth.remember: Keep this session open on this device
admin.auth.errorCsrf: The session expired. Reload the page and try again.
admin.auth.errorUsername: Use 3 to 64 letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, or underscores.
admin.auth.errorPasswordLength: The password must contain at least 12 characters.
admin.auth.errorPasswordMatch: The two passwords do not match.
admin.auth.errorAlreadyConfigured: This instance already has an administrator account.
admin.auth.errorSetup: The administrator account could not be created.
admin.auth.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

admin.servers.title: Servers
admin.probes.httpHint: Insight checks that this address responds.
admin.probes.icmpHint: Checks that the machine responds to ping.
admin.probes.tcpHint: Checks that this port accepts a connection.
admin.probes.dnsHint: Resolves this name and checks the answer when needed.
admin.probes.heartbeatHint: Name of the job that will use the generated URL.
admin.probes.websocketHint: Opens the connection and exchanges a message when needed.
admin.probes.mqttHint: Connects to the broker and waits for a message when requested.
admin.probes.sqlHint: Connects to MySQL, MariaDB, or PostgreSQL.
admin.probes.dockerHint: Checks that this container is running and healthy. Docker access must be allowed on the host first.
admin.probes.grpcHint: Checks the standard gRPC health endpoint.
admin.probes.grpcServiceHint: Leave empty for the server-wide health check.
admin.probes.smtpHint: Opens an SMTP session and checks TLS negotiation.
admin.probes.smtpChecksHint: Connects, negotiates TLS, and verifies the server.
admin.probes.rabbitMqHint: Connects to the AMQP broker with the supplied account.
admin.probes.snmpHint: Reads an SNMP v2c value without changing the device.
admin.probes.snmpChecksHint: Reads one SNMP v2c value without changing the device.
admin.probes.serviceHint: Uses the selected agent to check a systemd or PM2 service.
admin.probes.serviceNotice: Runs only from the named agent. Use agent://agent-key/systemd/service.service or agent://agent-key/pm2/application.
admin.probes.name: Name
admin.probes.calculationDefaultTitle: The simple choice: leave Automatic on
admin.probes.calculationDefaultDescripti: Think of Insight as a small robot. Every minute, it asks the site: "are you okay?" If there is no reply for two minutes, it says "I don't know." Those minutes count as neither good nor bad.
admin.probes.strictAvailability: Count a missing reply as downtime
admin.probes.strictAvailabilityHint: Leave this off unless monitoring itself must never miss a minute.
admin.probes.secretConfigured: Secret configured · leave blank to keep it
admin.probes.secretConfiguredHint: Leave empty to keep saved protected data.
admin.probes.dockerWarning: Docker access must be allowed on the host first.
admin.probes.verifyTlsHint: An invalid certificate reports an outage.
admin.probes.heartbeatSecretHint: The ping URL is shown only once.
admin.probes.activeHint: Turning it off keeps the history.
admin.probes.publicVisibleHint: Each status page can choose differently.
admin.probes.errorDiagnostic: The diagnostic could not be loaded.
admin.probes.heartbeatOnce: Call this URL from your job. The secret will not be displayed again.
admin.probes.deleteDescription: Its history, incidents, and statistics will also be deleted.
admin.probes.errorTarget: Enter a valid target no longer than 255 characters.
admin.probes.errorHttp: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
admin.probes.errorIcmp: Enter only a hostname or IP address.
admin.probes.errorTcp: Enter a valid host and port, such as server.example.com:22.
admin.probes.errorWebSocket: Enter a valid ws:// or wss:// URL.
admin.probes.errorMqtt: Enter a valid mqtt:// or mqtts:// broker URL.
admin.probes.errorSql: Enter a database URL without credentials, including its database name.
admin.probes.errorDocker: Enter a Docker endpoint and container, such as docker://local/api.
admin.probes.errorGrpc: Enter a valid gRPC endpoint, such as grpcs://api.example.com:443.
admin.probes.errorRedis: Enter a valid Redis endpoint, such as rediss://cache.example.com:6380/0.
admin.probes.errorSmtp: Enter a valid SMTP endpoint, such as smtp://mail.example.com:587.
admin.probes.errorRabbitMq: Enter a valid RabbitMQ endpoint, such as amqps://mq.example.com:5671/production.
admin.probes.errorSnmp: Enter a valid SNMP endpoint, such as snmp://switch.example.com:161.
admin.probes.errorService: Enter a valid agent service, such as agent://paris-1/systemd/nginx.service.
admin.probes.errorSqlReadOnly: Only one SELECT, SHOW, WITH, or EXPLAIN query is allowed.
admin.probes.errorVariables: Secret variables must form a JSON object.
admin.probes.errorBrowserScenario: The browser scenario must be a valid list of supported actions.
admin.probes.errorDnsRecord: Select a supported DNS record type.
admin.probes.errorHeaders: Request headers must form a JSON object.
admin.probes.errorEncryption: The Basic Auth password cannot be encrypted with the current configuration.
admin.probes.errorType: This check type is not supported.
admin.probes.errorInterval: This check frequency is not supported.
admin.probes.errorDatabase: MariaDB is unavailable. The monitor was not created.
admin.probes.errorGeneric: The monitor could not be created.
admin.network.title: Probe network
admin.network.description: Run checks from several independent locations and aggregate their observations.
admin.network.enrollmentHint: Create the identity here, then deploy the generated configuration on the remote machine.
admin.network.secretOnce: The secret is displayed once. Keep the existing agent volume during updates and outages.
admin.network.standaloneHint: Set INSIGHT_DISTRIBUTED_MODE=hub and restart the worker before relying on remote agents.
admin.network.errorGeneric: The agent could not be updated.

admin.incidents.noPostmortem: No postmortem has been written yet.

admin.notifications.appriseHint: One URL per line. All 138+ Apprise services are accepted.
admin.notifications.minimumSeverityHint: Events below this severity are ignored.
admin.notifications.routingHint: Leave every monitor unchecked to receive events from all monitors.
admin.notifications.deleteDescription: Future events will no longer be sent to this destination.
admin.notifications.secretConfigured: Secret configured · leave blank to keep it

admin.notifications.errorHeaders: Headers must be a valid JSON object.
admin.notifications.errorFreeMobile: The Free Mobile username and key are required.
admin.notifications.errorApprise: Enter at least one valid Apprise URL.
admin.notifications.errorTemplate: The title and message are required.
admin.notifications.errorTemplateSyntax: This message contains invalid Liquid syntax.
admin.notifications.errorEncryptionKey: INSIGHT_NOTIFICATION_ENCRYPTION_KEY is missing or too short.
admin.notifications.errorEncryptedConfig: This encrypted configuration cannot be opened.

admin.notifications.errorPython: The Python notification engine is unavailable.

admin.oncall.description: Escalate unacknowledged incidents to the active destination.
admin.oncall.name: Name
admin.oncall.shiftsHint: The active shift receives each escalation.
admin.oncall.allWhenEmpty: Leave empty to cover every monitor.
admin.oncall.deleteDescription: Future incidents will no longer use this escalation path.

admin.oncall.errorDates: The shift end must be after its start.

admin.access.title: Access
admin.access.description: Choose who signs in to Insight and how your tools control it.
admin.access.modeApiDescription: Scripts, CI/CD, and backends use API tokens.
admin.access.modeSsoDescription: Your identity provider protects this dashboard.
admin.access.apiHint: For scripts, CI/CD, and backend services.
admin.access.apiEnabledHint: Disabling this immediately cuts off every token.
admin.access.oauthHint: Insight authenticates its users with OpenID Connect.
admin.access.oauthEnabledHint: Each application receives its own ID and secret.
admin.access.publicUrlRequired: Set a public HTTPS URL before enabling it.
admin.access.ssoHint: Users sign in with your organization’s identity provider.
admin.access.ssoConfigDescription: Issuer, OIDC client, and access rules remain server-side.
admin.access.guideDescription: Endpoints and settings for your automation and dashboards.
admin.access.guideApiBefore: Enable the API and create a token from
admin.access.guideOpenApi: OpenAPI schema available once the API is enabled:
admin.access.guideProviderDescription: Register its exact redirect URI, then use OpenID Connect discovery.
admin.access.guideClientVerifyAfter: , the issuer, audience, and RS256 signature. Keep the secret on its server only.
admin.access.guideSsoDescription: Create a confidential OIDC client with this exact callback URL at your identity provider.
admin.access.guideSsoPolicyBefore: An email list, group list, or
admin.access.guideSsoPolicyAfter: is required. The local account remains available at
admin.access.name: Name
admin.access.secretOnce: They will not be displayed again after closing.
admin.access.noTokens: No token yet. Create one to call the API.
admin.access.noClients: No application yet. Add the one that will use Insight to sign in.
admin.access.copyFailed: The value could not be copied.
admin.access.confirmDeleteClient: Delete this dashboard and all its tokens?
admin.access.errorName: Enter a name between 2 and 120 characters.
admin.access.errorRedirectUri: Use an exact HTTPS URI, or HTTP on localhost only.
admin.access.errorPublicUrl: INSIGHT_PUBLIC_URL must use HTTPS, or localhost during development.
admin.sso.errorConfiguration: The SSO configuration is incomplete or insecure.

admin.oauth.consentDescription: wants to use your Insight identity.

admin.login.totpDescription: Enter the code generated by your authenticator app or a recovery code.

admin.incidents.publishedHint: It appears on affected status pages.
